title: Document channel capacity 256 choice in main.rs
description: main.rs lines 23-24 create two sync_channel::<_>(256) channels with no comment explaining the capacity. A contributor reading this will not know: (1) whether 256 was measured or guessed, (2) what the backpressure behavior is when the buffer fills (send() blocks the background task; if the UI thread is also blocked, deadlock is possible), (3) whether the same value for both directions was intentional. Add a comment stating the rationale: e.g. 'capacity chosen to buffer bursts of SSE state-change events without blocking the client task; if the UI falls more than 256 events behind, the client task will block' — or whatever the actual reasoning is.
